mapper.select: select count(*) from virtual_inventory_unit where listing_id = #{listingId} and status = 'AVAILABLE'

select inventory_unit_id, listing_id, seller_user_id, payload_type, payload_content, status, reserved_order_id, delivered_at, create_time from virtual_inventory_unit where listing_id = #{listingId} and status = 'AVAILABLE' order by inventory_unit_id asc limit #{limit} for update

select inventory_unit_id, listing_id, seller_user_id, payload_type, payload_content, status, reserved_order_id, delivered_at, create_time from virtual_inventory_unit where reserved_order_id = #{reservedOrderId} order by inventory_unit_id asc
